one_time_description: Trans Mountain revenue of $8,310,831 - likely pipeline project-related payments, significantly higher than prior year $5,597,366
economic_notes: Nation has 99.9% ownership in Shxw'owhamel Ventures Limited Partnership (SVLP) and 100% ownership in Shxw'owhamel Ventures GP Ltd. (SVGP), both accounted for using modified equity method. Earnings from equity investments were $6,955,745 in 2023.
notes: Trans Mountain revenue of $8.3M is a significant revenue driver (up from $5.6M prior year). Earnings from equity investments in SVLP are $6.96M. Nation holds marketable securities of $19.06M and investment in joint venture of $13.36M. Accumulated surplus grew dramatically from $31.1M to $47.8M. GBEs (SVLP and SVGP) are excluded from consolidation and accounted for by modified equity method. Current liabilities calculation excludes long-term debt; only short-term items included (AP $16, interest payable $4,801, wages payable $24,788, damage deposits $7,480, employee deductions $12,630). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + CMHC + Sto:lo + Aboriginal Headstart + Government of Canada + FNESC + RRF = $3,059,373. Financial statements signed November 13, 2024, over 18 months after fiscal year end.
